home.subtitle: Start a new match or scan a QR code to join a match
home.qrcodeUsage: The organizer of the match must scan this QR code to let you join the match.
home.nfcWriteModalInstruction: Hold your phone near the NFC tag until writing finishes.
home.nfcWriteModalSuccess: Written successfully. The organizer can read your ID from the tag.
home.nfcWriteModalErrorGeneric: Could not write to the tag. Please try again.
home.nfcWriteModalErrorNotAllowed: Permission denied or NFC is off. Enable NFC and try again.
home.nfcWriteModalErrorNotSupported: This tag or device does not support this operation.
home.nfcWriteModalErrorAborted: Operation cancelled. Hold the tag close and try again.

step1.heading: What should we call you?
step1.description: We will use this name to identify you in the app and for communications.

step2.heading: What is your gender?
step2.description: This is a sports app and we need your gender to keep matches fair and fun for everyone.

homeConfirmModal.title: Exit scoreboard
homeConfirmModal.message: When exiting the scoreboard to the home, the current game will be restarted. Do you want to continue?

resetConfirmModal.title: Reset game
resetConfirmModal.message: Reset score, games and sets? The undo history will also be cleared. Do you want to continue?

undoConfirmModal.title: Undo last action
undoConfirmModal.message: The last action will be undone: {{action}}. Do you want to continue?

saveMatchToHistoryConfirmModal.title: Save match to history
saveMatchToHistoryConfirmModal.message: The match will be saved to the history. Do you want to continue?
